name: FortiGate Critical Events
description: Detects critical system events reported by a FortiGate firewall. These events indicate serious issues that require immediate attention.

prompts.prompt: A critical system event has been reported by a FortiGate firewall. This indicates a severe issue requiring immediate attention. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Log ID** {log_id}, **Message** {message}, **Virtual Domain (VDOM)** {vdom}, **Severity** {severity}. Investigate this critical event immediately to prevent or mitigate potential impact on network security.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the critical event.

parameters.name: log_id
parameters.description: The FortiGate log ID, crucial for identifying the specific event.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The full log message providing context for the critical event.

parameters.name: vdom
parameters.description: The Virtual Domain (VDOM) where the critical event occurred.

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: The severity level of the event, confirming its critical nature.
